fullName:
com.blockether.spel.snapshot-test.Comprehensive ref stability tests using controlled HTML.

   Tests that content-hash refs (FNV-1a of role|name|tag) are stable across
   DOM mutations that don't change element identity. Uses set-content! for
   fully deterministic HTML — no external site dependencies..identity-changing mutations.changing button text produces a different ref
name:
Comprehensive ref stability tests using controlled HTML.

   Tests that content-hash refs (FNV-1a of role|name|tag) are stable across
   DOM mutations that don't change element identity. Uses set-content! for
   fully deterministic HTML — no external site dependencies. > identity-changing mutations > changing button text produces a different ref
